best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-ranking-001 title: complete a ranking task module: ranking source pages: 1, 5 preconditions: user is logged in and has a ranking task to complete. test data: - rankingid: 1 - missionid: 1 test steps: 1. navigate to the ranking task page. 2. click on the complete button for the ranking task. 3. verify that the association between the user and the ranking task is updated. 4. check that the ranking task status is marked as completed. expected result: the ranking task should be marked as completed, and the user's progress should be updated in the database.

test case id: tc-utente-001 title: register a new user with valid credentials module: utente source pages: 3 preconditions: test data: - email: example@example.com - password: testpassword123 test steps: 1. enter email and password in the registration form. 2. click on the register button. 3. verify that the firebase authentication service is called with the provided email and password. 4. check that the response is not an error. 5. verify that the firebaseuser and userid are returned. 6. confirm that the user is logged in. 7. check that the user's data is stored in the database. expected result: user registration should succeed, and the user should be logged in with the correct firebaseuser and userid.

test case id: tc-database-001 title: update user data in the real-time database module: database source pages: 4, 5 preconditions: user has completed a task. test data: - hashmap: {"punti": 100} test steps: 1. call the method to convert the hashmap to json. 2. send the json data as a rest/http/2 request to the real-time database. 3. verify that the data is successfully updated in the database. 4. check that the asynchronous response is received. expected result: the user's data should be updated in the real-time database, and the response should indicate success.
